'''Slythor''' was a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and owner of the [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4-series agromech droid]] [[R4-B11]]. He worked from a base on [[Korad]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He often considered himself the "[[Highest Exalted Ruler of Korad]]." Many people doubted that because nobody wanted to live on the junk-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He traveled around on the planet on the ''[[The Peeve|Peeve]]'', which was a pleasure craft made from the ruins of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT Walker]].

{{Char-stub}}
